basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Associate Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 26-06-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Engineering in (ECE/EE and allied branches) with 2 Year Experience OR MSc (Electronics) with 2-year Experience OR M.Tech/ME in VLSI /Microelectronics or allied areas.
qualification.details: Engineering in (ECE/EE and allied branches) with 2 Year Experience OR MSc (Electronics) with 2-year Experience OR M.Tech/ME in VLSI / Microelectronics or allied areas.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Bhilai Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Associate position at IIT Bhilai is 26th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches them before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates need an Engineering degree in ECE/EE or allied branches with 2 years of experience, or an MSc in Electronics with 2 years of experience, or an M.Tech/ME in VLSI/Microelectronics or related fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate position is 45 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the salary for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 45,000 per month for the Project Associate role at IIT Bhilai.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the IIT Bhilai Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate position at IIT Bhilai will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, the job is contractual in nature. The recruitment is for a Project Associate position, which is typically a temporary role tied to a specific project.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are needed for the application?
faq.answer: You will need to attach self-attested copies of your educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.
